summary: Promoted the Scholar's EMR data-cleaning and phenotype-classification routines to reusable skills, and logged the PI's core growth edges (establish guideline reference values before literature comparison; advance from characterization to a testable hypothesis).

Distilled cohort A cycle 1 into a reusable confounder-testing capability, an anti-circularity/definition-stability taste principle, validated ATTR data caveats, and a diabetes-as-competing-cause concept-model update; ledgered the self-corrected directional over-claim and the remaining PI-nudged goal dependence.

Turns the PI's compound-code and assumption-checking critiques into new/updated methods, and lifts questioning and goal autonomy (both scored 1) via strategy and goal artifacts anchored on the cardiac-predominant, dual-coding TTR cohort model.
